name: Beverly Hills Jewelry Watch & Loan
description_short: Beverly Hills Jewelry, Watch, & Loan is a pawn shop in Winter Garden, Florida offering collateral-based loans against jewelry, watches, and other valuables with flexible terms.
description_long:
Beverly Hills Jewelry, Watch, & Loan operates as a pawn shop under Beverly Hills JWL LLC, serving the Winter Garden, Florida area from their single physical location. The business is positioned as part of a family of companies that includes Beverly Hills Jewelers, suggesting operational synergies between retail jewelry sales and pawn lending services. Their online presence includes an eBay store for selling items, indicating active inventory turnover and secondary sales channels beyond traditional pawn operations.

The company offers pawn loan services as their primary offering, allowing customers to use personal items as collateral for fast cash. Their website indicates they buy and accept a variety of items for pawn, though specific details on item categories are limited to a "What We Buy" section that lacks detailed specifications. They also maintain special promotions and collections highlighting recently listed items, suggesting an active marketplace for both pawn loans and secondary item sales. The business emphasizes in-person visits during standard business hours as the preferred interaction method.

Beverly Hills Jewelry, Watch, & Loan distinguishes itself through its affiliation with Beverly Hills Jewelers, potentially allowing for expert appraisal of jewelry and watches. Their integration of eBay sales suggests a professional approach to inventory management and secondary resale of pawned items. The business maintains direct communication channels including phone and email support, along with a physical storefront in an established retail area.

The company's main limitations are transparency-related: their website lacks detailed information about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or APR disclosures. Specific categories of items accepted and loan amount ranges are not clearly documented online. For consumers seeking pawn services, this business requires direct contact or in-person visits to understand terms, which may not suit those researching options remotely.
address: 12348 W Colonial Dr, Winter Garden, FL 34787

company_info.headquarters: 12348 W Colonial Dr, Winter Garden, FL 34787

pros: Physical retail location in Winter Garden with consistent business hours (9am-6pm)
Affiliated with Beverly Hills Jewelers, suggesting expert jewelry and watch appraisal capabilities
Active secondary sales channel through eBay store for liquidating inventory
Multiple contact methods available including phone (407-877-5626) and email (info@407pawn.com)
Established business with online presence and website functionality
Specializes in high-value items including jewelry and watches, suggesting quality assessment expertise
cons: Website provides no disclosure of loan terms, APR, interest rates, or repayment periods
Lacks specific details about which item categories are accepted for pawn
No information on loan amount ranges or minimum/maximum lending limits
Requires in-person visit or direct contact to obtain pricing and terms; minimal online information
Limited transparency about how collateral is stored, insured, or protected
best_for: Local Winter Garden residents needing quick collateral-based loans against jewelry or watches
Individuals with high-value watches or jewelry seeking expert appraisal and pawn services
People seeking in-person pawn shop services with established retail operations
diagnosis: Beverly Hills Jewelry, Watch, & Loan is best suited for local customers in Winter Garden, Florida who have jewelry or watches to pawn and prefer face-to-face transactions with established businesses. The main caveat is the almost complete absence of online transparency regarding loan terms, rates, and conditions—customers must visit in person or call directly to understand pricing, making remote comparison shopping impossible.
services: Pawn loan services against personal collateral
Inventory collections and featured item listings
